description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Add 1 general admission ticket for a Friday DJ or electronic event happening within the next 30 days with a starting ticket price under $35 to your cart and choose mobile ticket delivery.

tasks.instruction: Request a VIP table reservation for 4 people on the next Saturday night using any package with a minimum spend of $400 or less that includes vodka and select an arrival time between 10:00 PM and 10:59 PM.

tasks.instruction: Join the guest list for a hip-hop or R&B event happening this weekend that offers guest list access, for 3 people (2 female and 1 male) arriving before 11:00 PM.

tasks.instruction: Within the next 30 days, compare the first two upcoming live band events, choose the one with the longer duration that has tickets priced at $50 or less, and add 2 of its cheapest eligible tickets to your cart.

target_names: Soul City Live: Extended Jam Session

tasks.instruction: Open the main featured event, compare the available Early Bird and General Admission tickets, and add 3 of the cheaper option costing $60 or less to your cart with e-ticket delivery selected.

target_names: Headliner DJ Night: Solaris at Neon Vault

tasks.instruction: For a Halloween event that includes a costume contest on Halloween night, RSVP with status “Interested” for yourself plus one guest and choose to receive only SMS notifications.

target_names: Halloween Nightmare: Costume Contest & Dance Party

tasks.instruction: Buy 2 tickets for a Friday EDM event and 2 tickets for a Saturday Latin event, each with ticket prices of $50 or less, and keep both sets of tickets only if the combined cart subtotal is at or below $200.

tasks.instruction: Register for a free workshop session that starts between 7:00 PM and 7:59 PM and explicitly decline the newsletter subscription.
